nasb.text: He said to me, “Son of man, feed your stomach and fill your body with this scroll which I am giving you.” Then I ate it, and it was sweet as honey in my mouth.

esv.text: And he said to me, “Son of man, feed your belly with this scroll that I give you and fill your stomach with it.” Then I ate it, and it was in my mouth as sweet as honey.

cnv.text: 他又對我說：“人子啊！把我賜給你的那書卷吃下去，填滿你的肚子。”於是我吃了，這書卷在我口裡像蜜糖一樣甘甜。

ccb.text: 对我说：“吃下我赐你的这书卷，让它充满你的肚腹。”我便吃了，书卷在我嘴里甘甜如蜜。
